'''âsh-t-p''' ('''kashatap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hilloa|hilloa]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hilloa|hilloa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-t-p
|-
! Lemma
| kashatap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishatap|thishatap]] || [[word:jishatap|jishatap]] || [[word:shishatap|shishatap]] || [[word:kishatap|kishatap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushatap|thuthushatap]] || [[word:jujushatap|jujushatap]] || [[word:shushushatap|shushushatap]] || [[word:kukushatap|kukushatap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushatap|thushatap]] || [[word:jushatap|jushatap]] || [[word:shushatap|shushatap]] || [[word:kushatap|kushatap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushatap|thushatap]] || [[word:jushatap|jushatap]] || [[word:shushatap|shushatap]] || [[word:kushatap|kushatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshatap|theshatap]] || [[word:jeshatap|jeshatap]] || [[word:sheshatap|sheshatap]] || [[word:keshatap|keshatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshatap|thothoshatap]] || [[word:jojoshatap|jojoshatap]] || [[word:shoshoshatap|shoshoshatap]] || [[word:kokoshatap|kokoshatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshatap|thoshatap]] || [[word:joshatap|joshatap]] || [[word:shoshatap|shoshatap]] || [[word:koshatap|koshatap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshatap|thoshatap]] || [[word:joshatap|joshatap]] || [[word:shoshatap|shoshatap]] || [[word:koshatap|koshatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshatap|thĂŠshatap]] || [[word:jĂŠshatap|jĂŠshatap]] || [[word:shĂŠshatap|shĂŠshatap]] || [[word:kĂŠshatap|kĂŠshatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashatap|thathashatap]] || [[word:jajashatap|jajashatap]] || [[word:shashashatap|shashashatap]] || [[word:kakashatap|kakashatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashatap|thashatap]] || [[word:jashatap|jashatap]] || [[word:shashatap|shashatap]] || [[word:kashatap|kashatap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashatap|thashatap]] || [[word:jashatap|jashatap]] || [[word:shashatap|shashatap]] || [[word:kashatap|kashatap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashatap|shashatap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashatap|goshashatap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashatap|gokishashatap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashatapnĂŒ|shashatapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashatapnknĂŒ|goshashatapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashatapnĂŒ|gokishashatapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashatapshĂ«|shashatapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashatapnkshĂ«|goshashatapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashatapshĂ«|gokishashatapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashatapro|shashatapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashatapnkro|goshashatapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashatapro|gokishashatapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashatapmu|shashatapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashatapnkmu|goshashatapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashatapmu|gokishashatapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashatapsher|shashatapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashatapnksher|goshashatapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashatapsher|gokishashatapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashatapng|shashatapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashatapnkng|goshashatapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashatapng|gokishashatapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashatapya|shashatapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashatapnkya|goshashatapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashatapya|gokishashatapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashatapyam|shashatapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashatapnkyam|goshashatapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashatapyam|gokishashatapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashatapnĂŒshĂ«|shashatapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashatapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashatapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashatapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashatapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashatapnĂŒro|shashatapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashatapnknĂŒro|goshashatapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashatapnĂŒro|gokishashatapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashatapnĂŒmu|shashatapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashatapnknĂŒmu|goshashatapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashatapnĂŒmu|gokishashatapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashatapshĂ«nĂŒ|shashatapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashatapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashatapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashatapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashatapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashatapshĂ«ro|shashatapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashatapnkshĂ«ro|goshashatapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashatapshĂ«ro|gokishashatapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashatapshĂ«mu|shashatapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashatapnkshĂ«mu|goshashatapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashatapshĂ«mu|gokishashatapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashatapronĂŒ|shashatapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashatapnkronĂŒ|goshashatapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashatapronĂŒ|gokishashatapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashataproshĂ«|shashataproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashatapnkroshĂ«|goshashatapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashataproshĂ«|gokishashataproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashatapromu|shashatapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashatapnkromu|goshashatapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashatapromu|gokishashatapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashatapmunĂŒ|shashatapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashatapnkmunĂŒ|goshashatapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashatapmunĂŒ|gokishashatapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashatapmushĂ«|shashatapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashatapnkmushĂ«|goshashatapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashatapmushĂ«|gokishashatapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashatapmuro|shashatapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashatapnkmuro|goshashatapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashatapmuro|gokishashatapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
